title: Post-CAR T Relapse Mechanism Coverage Report v0

coverage_basis.counting_method: Counts public extraction records and extracted signals by mechanism_group_id in the current public repository.
coverage_basis.coverage_status_rule: Zero records means needs-first-extraction; one record means needs-second-source-extraction; two or more records means covered-for-v0-navigation. These are artifact-coverage statuses, not biological rankings.

mechanism_coverage.label: BCMA antigen loss, low density, or target alteration
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current BCMA antigen-loss coverage for navigation only; do not rank biological importance from counts.
coverage_notes: This bucket has the cleanest structured coverage today, but that does not mean antigen escape is dominant.
Review and source-specific extraction are still needed before any mechanism-frequency claim.

mechanism_coverage.label: CAR T fitness, exhaustion, expansion, or persistence
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current CAR T fitness, exhaustion, expansion, or persistence coverage for navigation only; do not rank biological importance from counts.
coverage_notes: This bucket now has source-specific coverage from Ledergor 2024 and review-level category coverage from Yue 2025.
Yue 2025 supports extraction-field coverage for T-cell-driven and immune microenvironment categories, not cohort-level comparison.

mechanism_coverage.label: Plasma-cell identity or lineage-state escape
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current plasma-cell identity or lineage-state coverage for navigation only; do not rank biological importance from counts.
coverage_notes: Second-source coverage now exists from Maura 2025 and Di Meo 2025 source records.
Di Meo 2025 supports target-linked phenotype field coverage, not a harmonized lineage-state ontology or clinical target-readiness claim.

mechanism_coverage.label: Disease burden, site, and high-risk context
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current disease burden, site, and high-risk context coverage for navigation only; do not rank biological importance from counts.
coverage_notes: Second-source context-field coverage now exists from Tedder and Bhutani 2025 plus the NCI PDQ health-professional summary.
This bucket should capture context variables before any relapse-mechanism comparison is attempted.
NCI PDQ fields support disease-burden, site, high-risk, disease-state, and prior-therapy context labels, not patient-specific risk interpretation, eligibility, availability, efficacy, or safety.

mechanism_coverage.label: Sequential or dual-target immune pressure
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current sequential or dual-target coverage for navigation only; do not rank biological importance from counts.
coverage_notes: Current coverage supports navigation across sequencing and alternate-target questions.
ClinicalTrials.gov and FDA source anchors still require separate trial and regulatory extraction before stronger claims.

mechanism_coverage.label: Measurement and follow-up gaps
mechanism_coverage.under_coverage_reason: At least two extraction records currently map to this mechanism bucket.
mechanism_coverage.next_extraction_need: Use current measurement and follow-up gap coverage for navigation only; do not rank biological importance from counts.
coverage_notes: This bucket is an interpretation-risk bucket rather than a specific biological mechanism.
More complete measurement fields are needed before cross-source comparison.

interpretation_boundary: Coverage counts are public artifact coverage metrics only.
Coverage counts are not evidence-strength rankings.
Coverage counts are not mechanism-frequency estimates.
Coverage counts are not biological-importance rankings.
Under-covered means more extraction is needed before comparison; it does not mean low priority or low importance.
This report is not medical advice, diagnostic guidance, treatment guidance, trial guidance, or a cure claim.

review_notes: Built from the public mechanism map and current public mechanism extraction records.
Created for issue #6 to separate artifact coverage imbalance from biological importance.
Issue #14 adds first-extraction coverage for plasma-cell identity or lineage-state escape.
Issue #15 adds second-source coverage for CAR T fitness, exhaustion, expansion, or persistence using the Yue 2025 review source.
Issue #16 adds first-extraction coverage for disease burden, disease site, high-risk, prior-therapy, and registry-context fields.
Step 13 adds second-source coverage for plasma-cell identity or lineage-state escape using the Di Meo 2025 target-linked phenotype source.
Step 14 adds second-source context-field coverage for disease burden, disease site, high-risk, disease-state, and prior-therapy fields using the NCI PDQ health-professional summary.
